rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper is directly about the endowment effect’s buyer–seller WTA/WTP gap and proposes a core explanatory mechanism (reference prices/transaction disutility), while the citing paper’s central contribution is to attenuate that same gap via payment method. Given this strong construct and mechanism overlap in the notes (both centered on endowment-effect theory in participative pricing contexts), the citation is plausibly foundational or a direct theoretical comparison rather than an incidental mention.
